books.title: Persuasion
books.author: Jane Austen
books.summary: A young woman meets again with a lover whose marriage proposal she had been persuaded to reject several years ago.

books.title: Treasure Island
books.author: Robert Louis Stevenson
books.summary: A young boy finds adventure on the high seas as he battles bloodthirsty pirates in search of a long-lost treasure.

books.title: The Autobiography of John Stuart Mill
books.author: John Stuart Mill
books.summary: The autobiography of English philosopher John Stuart Mill.

books.title: The Lives and Opinions of Eminent Philosophers
books.author: Diogenes Laërtius
books.summary: Brief biographies of the prominent philosophers of ancient Greece.

books.title: Pollyanna Grows Up
books.author: Eleanor H. Porter
books.summary: Pollyanna recovers from an automobile accident with the help of a nearby dowager, before leaving the country to later return to rural Vermont.

books.title: Man and Superman
books.author: George Bernard Shaw
books.summary: Jack Tanner flees both London and responsibility when he is made guardian of his childhood friend Ann Whitehead.

books.title: Henry VIII
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: King Henry VIII plans to divorce his first wife for Anne Bullen.

books.title: The Water of the Wondrous Isles
books.author: William Morris
books.summary: A beautiful woman escapes a life of servitude under an evil witch to adventure through a series of magical islands.

books.title: From the Earth to the Moon
books.author: Jules Verne
books.summary: After the end of the Civil War, the Baltimore Gun Club decides to apply its engineering expertise to the design of a cannon capable of shooting a projectile to the Moon.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Edgar Allan Poe
books.summary: A collection of Edgar Allan Poe’s short fiction, ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The Worst Journey in the World
books.author: Apsley Cherry-Garrard
books.summary: The travelogue of a member of Robert Scott’s ill-fated Antarctic expedition of 1910.

books.title: The Mystery of the Yellow Room
books.author: Gaston Leroux
books.summary: A young reporter struggles to investigate a seemingly impossible crime, in which an assailant has escaped from a locked bedroom completely unseen.

books.title: The City of God
books.author: Augustine of Hippo
books.summary: Bishop Augustine of Hippo provides a defense of the Christian faith against its pagan critics, as well as explaining God’s work and purposes in world history, from beginning to end.

books.title: Demian
books.author: Hermann Hesse
books.summary: A boy goes on a journey of spiritual growth.

books.title: Poetry
books.author: John Keats
books.summary: A collection of John Keats’ published poems, and a selection of unpublished fragments and posthumous verse.

books.title: Sunshine Sketches of a Little Town
books.author: Stephen Leacock
books.summary: A humorous account of life in the fictional small town of Mariposa.

books.title: Search the Sky
books.author: Frederik Pohl
books.summary: A man visits several worlds as he attempts to discover why humanity is dying out.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: H. Beam Piper
books.summary: A collection of science fiction stories by H. Beam Piper ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The Varieties of Religious Experience
books.author: William James
books.summary: A philospher and psychologist surveys direct religious experiences, including healthy-mindedness, saintliness, conversion and mysticism.

books.title: A Negro Explorer at the North Pole
books.author: Matthew Henson
books.summary: The self-told story of the black man who accompanied Robert Peary during the first trip to the North Pole.
